top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE PostId = (SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE Title = 'Clustering 1D data')) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE ParentId = (SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE Title = 'Clustering 1D data')) AS total_comments_and_answers

SELECT 
    COUNT(c.Id) AS comment_count,
    COUNT(p.Id) AS answer_count
FROM posts
LEFT JOIN comments c ON posts.Id = c.PostId
LEFT JOIN posts p ON posts.Id = p.ParentId AND p.PostTypeId = 2
WHERE posts.Title = 'Clustering 1D data';

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE PostId = (SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE Title = 'Clustering 1D data')) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE ParentId = (SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE Title = 'Clustering 1D data')) AS total_comments_and_answers

SELECT 
    COUNT(c.Id) AS comment_count,
    COUNT(p.Id) AS answer_count
FROM posts
LEFT JOIN comments c ON posts.Id = c.PostId
LEFT JOIN posts p ON posts.Id = p.ParentId AND p.PostTypeId = 2
WHERE posts.Title = 'Clustering 1D data';

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE PostId = p.Id) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE ParentId = p.Id) AS total_comments_and_answers
FROM posts p
WHERE p.Title = 'Clustering 1D data';

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE PostId = (SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE Title = 'Clustering 1D data')) +
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE ParentId = (SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE Title = 'Clustering 1D data')) AS total_comments_and_answers
